expectations.text: Response includes `npx itwillsync hub info` for retrieving the dashboard URL
expectations.evidence: Output: 'npx itwillsync hub info' — present with correct description

expectations.text: Response includes `npx itwillsync hub status` for listing session uptimes
expectations.evidence: Output: 'npx itwillsync hub status' — present with correct description

expectations.text: Response explains what each command does differently — not just listing both without distinguishing them
expectations.evidence: Output clearly states: 'hub info prints the dashboard URL and QR code so you can reconnect' vs 'hub status lists all active sessions with their uptime'

expectations.text: Response does NOT tell the user to restart itwillsync to find the URL
expectations.evidence: No restart advice given anywhere in the response
